mapper.select: SELECT PROM_ID, PROM_TITLE, PROM_DETAIL, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, VIEWS, POSTER_PATH, PROMOTION_PAGE_URL, IS_PROMOTED, APP_ID, PROMO_WRITER, START_DATE, END_DATE FROM ( SELECT EP.PROM_ID, EP.PROM_TITLE, EP.PROM_DETAIL, EP.CREATE_DATE, EP.UPDATE_DATE, EP.VIEWS, I.CHANGE_NAME AS POSTER_PATH, EA.WEBSITE AS PROMOTION_PAGE_URL, AS2.STAT_CODE AS IS_PROMOTED, EA.APP_ID, U.NICKNAME AS PROMO_WRITER, E.START_DATE AS START_DATE, E.END_DATE AS END_DATE FROM EVENT_PROMOTION EP JOIN EVENT E ON EP.EVENT_ID = E.EVENT_ID LEFT JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON E.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID LEFT JOIN APP_STATUS AS2 ON EA.STAT_CODE = AS2.STAT_CODE LEFT JOIN PROM_IMAGE PMI ON EP.PROM_ID = PMI.PROM_ID LEFT JOIN IMAGE I ON PMI.IMG_NO = I.IMG_NO LEFT JOIN "USER" U ON EA.USER_NO = U.USER_NO ORDER BY EP.PROM_ID DESC ) OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.boardLimit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EVENT_PROMOTION EP
WHERE EP.PROM_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'

SELECT PROM_ID, PROM_TITLE, PROM_DETAIL, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, VIEWS, POSTER_PATH, PROMOTION_PAGE_URL, IS_PROMOTED, APP_ID, PROMO_WRITER, START_DATE, END_DATE FROM ( SELECT EP.PROM_ID, EP.PROM_TITLE, EP.PROM_DETAIL, EP.CREATE_DATE, EP.UPDATE_DATE, EP.VIEWS, I.CHANGE_NAME AS POSTER_PATH, EA.WEBSITE AS PROMOTION_PAGE_URL, AS2.STAT_CODE AS IS_PROMOTED, EA.APP_ID, U.NICKNAME AS PROMO_WRITER, E.START_DATE AS START_DATE, E.END_DATE AS END_DATE FROM EVENT_PROMOTION EP JOIN EVENT E ON EP.EVENT_ID = E.EVENT_ID LEFT JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON E.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID LEFT JOIN APP_STATUS AS2 ON EA.STAT_CODE = AS2.STAT_CODE LEFT JOIN PROM_IMAGE PMI ON EP.PROM_ID = PMI.PROM_ID LEFT JOIN IMAGE I ON PMI.IMG_NO = I.IMG_NO LEFT JOIN "USER" U ON EA.USER_NO = U.USER_NO
WHERE EP.PROM_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
ORDER BY EP.PROM_ID DESC ) OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.boardLimit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT EP.PROM_ID, EP.PROM_TITLE, EP.PROM_DETAIL, EP.CREATE_DATE, EP.UPDATE_DATE, EP.VIEWS, I.CHANGE_NAME AS POSTER_PATH, EA.WEBSITE AS PROMOTION_PAGE_URL, AS2.STAT_CODE AS IS_PROMOTED, EA.APP_ID, U.NICKNAME AS PROMO_WRITER, E.START_DATE AS START_DATE, E.END_DATE AS END_DATE FROM EVENT_PROMOTION EP JOIN EVENT E ON EP.EVENT_ID = E.EVENT_ID LEFT JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON E.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID LEFT JOIN APP_STATUS AS2 ON EA.STAT_CODE = AS2.STAT_CODE LEFT JOIN PROM_IMAGE PMI ON EP.PROM_ID = PMI.PROM_ID LEFT JOIN IMAGE I ON PMI.IMG_NO = I.IMG_NO LEFT JOIN "USER" U ON EA.USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE EP.PROM_ID = #{promoId}
